topic: Reminiscing about college days and discussing career paths

cast.name: Sam
cast.persona: A software engineer at a startup, enthusiastic but slightly burned out. Former CS major who loved algorithms.

cast.name: Riley
cast.persona: A high school teacher who switched from corporate marketing. Finds fulfillment in education despite lower pay.
goals: Encourage friends to consider what truly matters

cast.name: Casey
cast.persona: A freelance photographer still figuring things out. Creative and optimistic but financially unstable.
goals: Defend the value of following creative passion

cast.name: Morgan
cast.persona: A medical resident, exhausted but driven. Always the responsible one in the group.
goals: Catch up with friends despite hectic schedule
Reflect on whether the sacrifice is worth it
